wertheimer-v-ryanair-dac-2025-11-01.lesson: Even a partial win becomes a loss when AI-fabricated citations strip your costs award.

s-f-c-i-o-2025-10-31.lesson: ChatGPT flips statutory meaning — never quote a code provision without pulling the primary source.

huang-v-champion-homes-sales-2025-10-30.lesson: Tribunals will disregard AI-drafted grounds wholesale when the filer cannot verify authorities.

oscartech-uk-ltd-v-orthofix-srl-2025-10-.lesson: Withdrawing AI citations only after opponent catches them still damages credibility — verify before filing.

ok-v-southern-ontario-secondary-schools-.lesson: If a tribunal cannot locate your cited decision, expect an ethics inquiry before a merits ruling.

bourse-de-limmobilier-multilogements-inc.lesson: Quebec courts will impose costs for ChatGPT-generated fictitious citations even against self-represented parties.

sky-gardens-2025-10-29.lesson: Fabricated exhibits plus phantom cases equals adverse costs — produce source documents when requested.

stelian-gheorghe-v-1-bsa-ahmad-bin-hezee.lesson: Witness statements are not exempt from citation verification — DIFC will tag the firm, not just the witness.

the-vancor-group-inc-v-2744364-ontario-l.lesson: Monitor review still catches AI fabrications — expect your factum to be audited line by line.

victoria-place-flats-rtm-company-ltd-ors.lesson: Microsoft Copilot hallucinates EWCA citations — enterprise AI is not a verification substitute.

re-sriram-aka-roy-2025-10-22.lesson: Courts now assume invented citations come from AI, not research error — the excuse is gone.

wu-v-murray-2025-10-21.lesson: Admitting AI fabrication does not mitigate costs — British Columbia factors it into the award.

chi-keung-lee-others-v-blackpool-bb-limi.lesson: AI will invent statutory subsections wholesale — always verify every code provision you quote.

xl-v-zl-et-al-2025-10-16.lesson: When hyperlinks point to unrelated cases, the court infers AI drafting and awards costs.

yk-v-the-high-state-prosecutors-office-i.lesson: Supreme Administrative Court verifies every quoted passage — phantom quotes surface on first read.

provincia-del-chubut-v-pra-2025-10-15.lesson: A judge pasting ChatGPT output into a ruling got the judgment annulled — disclosure and traceability are non-negotiable.

lugasi-aklim-systems-v-netivot-municipal.lesson: Israeli courts now spot ChatGPT citation strings and discard the evidence without prompting.

tb-v-km-2025-10-15.lesson: Mismatched citations and case names trigger pleading strikes — verify every authority by name and neutral cite.

gloriose-ndaryiyumvire-v-birmingham-city.lesson: LEAP and other paid legal AI will fabricate authority — wasted-costs plus bar referral follow automatically.

ric-n-30542025-2025-10-14.lesson: Italian TARs now refer AI-hallucinating counsel to the bar — 1,500 EUR costs are the smaller half of the penalty.
